Building Agentic AI Systems for Business Automation  | Data Engineer

tweets.text:
Just shipped Noderift at the @OpenAI x @Outskill hackathon 🚀
Noderift is a visual workflow automation tool — but instead of building workflows manually, you just describe what you want and the AI builds it for you.
"Fetch a joke from this API and email it to me every day at 5pm"
tweets.name: Aman Kumar Srivastava

tweets.text:
I'm building Noderift for the @Outskill AI Builders Hackathon 🧵

Most workflow automation tools (n8n, Zapier, Make) make you wire nodes manually.

Noderift flips that — you describe what you want in plain English, and an AI agent builds & runs the workflow for you.
tweets.name: Aman Kumar Srivastava

tweets.text:
Day 12 of building https://t.co/47UJh8BEQI 🚀

Shipped today: → Multi-stage Docker build — React frontend + FastAPI backend in a single unified image. → Fixed a sneaky routing conflict where FastAPI's root was silently blocking the entire frontend. → Containerized the full
tweets.name: Aman Kumar Srivastava

tweets.text:
Day 11 of building https://t.co/47UJh8BEQI🚀

Shipped today: → Premium, ultra-sleek landing page with a gorgeous glassmorphic capsule design. → Stagger-delayed loading animations that make the viewport feel incredibly fluid. → Live interactive React Flow canvas simulating https://t.co/tek0UxWWFP
tweets.name: Aman Kumar Srivastava

tweets.text:
I needed a log viewer for my project https://t.co/47UJh8BEQI

Requirements were simple:
→ lightweight
→ no heavy setup
→ teammates can see logs without EC2 access

Found Dozzle. The Docker image is ~30MB. That's it. 🧵 https://t.co/ReSsvtLFgx
tweets.name: Aman Kumar Srivastava

tweets.text:
Day 10 of building Noderift🚀

Shipped today: → Super smooth sidebar sliding (drag near-zero) + slide-up variables. → Dedicated Execution History page with auto-triggered runs logging. → Fixed DAG data passing — no more python compilation KeyErrors. → You can now connect HTTP
tweets.name: Aman Kumar Srivastava
